certified_capabilities: Verifies dispatch, assignment, invocation request, authorization, execution packet, Worker identity, chain, replay, authority, and hash continuity.
Binds invocation to assigned Worker identity, assigned Worker family, execution packet scope, allowed outputs, forbidden operations, and validation requirements.
Persists invocation evidence, classification, artifact, and result.
Supports Filesystem Worker, Monitoring Worker, and approved Trading Improvement acceptance flows.
Integrates CLI progression from Worker Dispatch to Worker Invocation.

validation_commands.command: python -m pytest tests/test_worker_invocation_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_dispatch_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_assignment_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_invocation_request_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_authorization_runtime_v1.py tests/test_ready_for_dispatch_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_runtime_v1.py tests/test_dispatch_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_runtime_v1.py tests/test_result_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_request_runtime_v1.py tests/test_implementation_plan_to_execution_request_runtime_v1.py

remaining_blockers_before_first_governed: A governed Worker result capture runtime must consume WORKER_INVOCATION_ARTIFACT_V1.

Result capture must bind Worker output to dispatch lineage, assignment lineage, invocation request lineage, authorization lineage, execution packet scope, allowed outputs, forbidden operations, replay continuity, and authority continuity.
Result validation, post-execution replay review, and termination remain separate downstream certifications.
